title: poa schoenoides
intro: Poa schoenoides, also known as blue grass or blue fescue grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. The medicinal properties of Poa schoenoides include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic, making it useful in treating conditions such as arthritis and edema. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Poa schoenoides typically involve making teas or infusions from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various health issues.
